raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I bought a lamp that was never deliver. I open a dispute immediately since that I have been month discussing the dispute with Citi bank because they resolved the issue on my behave but they continue to reverse the credit. {$1400.00} credit from XX/XX/XXXX was reversed again on XXXX. I will not pay for goods that were not delivered, especially since I have provided proof of this. I requested an audit to be sent to me a month ago, but I have yet to receive it. If Citicard affects my credit, I will escalate this matter further. This issue requires urgent attention. Despite calling every week, the audit promised by Citibank has not been sent to me. I am growing increasingly weary of this situation.
